description: Returns the history of completed and available dial attempts for the current number. Returns null if not available

completedAttempts.description: Number of completed dial attempts across all numbers in the campaign

availableAttempts.description: Number of remaining dial attempts across all numbers in the campaign

completedAttemptsToPhone.description: Number of completed dial attempts to the current phone number

availableAttemptsToPhone.description: Number of remaining dial attempts to the current phone number
